title: Build an HTML Video Player
description: A native HTML video player built using the video element with multiple source formats for broad browser compatibility. The player includes MP4, WebM, OGG, and QuickTime sources, along with a poster image, playback controls, loop, and muted attributes — all without any JavaScript.
objectives: Use the video element to embed a playable video
Add multiple source elements to support different video formats
Set type attributes to declare the correct MIME type for each source
Use poster to display a thumbnail before playback
Apply controls, loop, and muted attributes to the video element

files.name: index.html
files.content: Working with the HTML Video Element
